lib_global_desc: Search across all active lists (Adding disabled)
lib_create_desc: Create a new category to add words
lib_import_desc: Copy a .txt file from your computer to the library
create_prompt: Type the name of the list to be created:
create_error_exists: A list with this name already exists
create_confirm: (Press Enter to confirm, Esc to cancel)
